purpose: A thread pool implementation that uses a blocking queue to distribute work across multiple threads. It allows posting messages/work items to a shared queue that worker threads process concurrently.

public_functions.name: ThreadPool::new
public_functions.signature: pub fn new<F>(nt: u8, f: F) -> ThreadPool<M> where F: FnOnce(&BlockingQueue<M>) -> () + Send + 'static + Copy

parameters.name: nt
parameters.description: Number of threads to spawn in the thread pool

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: A function/closure that defines the processing logic each thread will execute, receiving a reference to the shared blocking queue

public_functions.description: Constructs and initializes a new ThreadPool, spawning the specified number of threads. Each thread runs the provided function closure with access to the shared blocking queue.

public_functions.name: ThreadPool::wait
public_functions.description: Blocks the calling thread until all worker threads in the pool have finished execution. Joins all thread handles using an Option-based hack to allow moving out of a Vec.

public_functions.name: ThreadPool::post_message
public_functions.signature: pub fn post_message(&mut self, _msg: M) where M: Debug + Clone

parameters.name: _msg
parameters.description: The message or work item to post to the thread pool's blocking queue

public_functions.description: Posts a message or work item to the thread pool's shared blocking queue, where it will be picked up and processed by one of the worker threads.

public_functions.name: ThreadPool::get_message
public_functions.signature: pub fn get_message(&mut self) -> M where M: Debug + Clone + Default
public_functions.description: Intended to retrieve a result message from an output queue. Currently incomplete/stub implementation that returns M::default(). Marked as a method to be fully defined in the future.

public_classes.name: ThreadPool<M>
public_classes.description: A generic thread pool struct parameterized over message type M (where M: Send + 'static). Contains a shared Arc-wrapped BlockingQueue for inter-thread communication and a Vec of optional JoinHandles for managing worker threads.
methods: post_message(&mut self, _msg: M) where M: Debug + Clone
get_message(&mut self) -> M where M: Debug + Clone + Default
